stemHtml: In a large transport aircraft with fully powered primary flight controls, redundancy can be achieved by…

options.a: fixing both control columns to each other so that increased force can be exerted by both pilots for manual reversion.
options.b: multiple flight control computers linked to multiple actuators supplied by different power sources.
options.c: duplex parallel control runs per control axis linked to the control surfaces actuator which is supplied by the hydraulic system.
options.d: accurate rigging of the flight control services during maintenance.
